case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ALBERTA HARRIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS, ALBERTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1651 SUNNYDALE AVE. S.F. CA. 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED AUG-04-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, ALBERTA
